sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Pet Companion System
special_mechanics.description: Four pet monsters that fight alongside Alisia autonomously, each with distinct attack types: Dragon Frye (fireballs), Boomerang Lizard (boomerangs), Thunder Raven (screen-wide thunder blast), Ball O' Fire (contact burn damage). Pets block enemy attacks and can be swapped or deactivated at any time.

special_mechanics.name: Energy/Power Management
special_mechanics.description: Alisia's lightning attack depletes with each volley and recharges when not attacking. Full charge enables multi-target screen-wide attack. Strategic power management required.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Only qualitative gameplay information available from Wikipedia. No quantitative movement physics, gravity values, or sub-pixel system data documented. Source focuses on narrative, mechanics description, and development rather than technical specifications.
